conversation.text: Can I see some case studies or talk to current clients?

fair request. we're pretty selective about who we work with and we launched markeye at the start of this year, so we're keeping the client list private for now|||however, the best case study is this chat right here. you're talking to the agent we build. Louis can show you real-world results and backend data on a quick call if you like?
I guess that makes sense. Let's talk to Louis.
